IFEWs

Model Components¶

Using the OpenMDAO framework, the multidisciplinary IFEWs model can be decomposed into a series of smaller interconnected components. These components are defined by their inputs and outputs.

Subsystems¶

Weather¶

First subsystem

Agriculture¶

Second subsystem

Ethanol Production¶

Third subsystem

Animal Agriculture¶

4th subsystem

Nitrogen Surplus¶

5th subsystem

Demand Corn¶

1st constraints

Demand Ethanol¶

2st constraints

Demand FP¶

3rd constraints
